meta_title: Free Online PDF Merger | Combine PDF Pages & Files
meta_description: Merge multiple PDF documents online instantly. Combine pages, reorder files, and save as one PDF. 100% private, browser-based.
subtitle: Combine PDF pages easily. Reorder sheets, join reports, and compile documents—all processed securely in your browser.

tool_workspace.description: Drag and drop your PDF files. Rearrange pages or files, then merge.

social_presets.description: Combine documents to create unified files for various requirements.

how_to.title: How to Merge PDF Files Online
how_to.step1_text: Click 'Upload PDFs' and select all the documents you wish to combine.
how_to.step2_text: Drag and drop the file cards to arrange them in the exact order you want them merged.
how_to.step3_text: Click 'Merge PDFs' to combine the pages instantly inside your browser.
how_to.step4_text: Save the single consolidated PDF document directly to your device.

faq.q1: Is there a file size limit for merging PDFs?
faq.a1: The limit depends on your device's memory since all processing is completed locally in the browser.
faq.q2: Will the merged PDF lose original document formatting?
faq.a2: No, the merging process preserves all text styles, layout margins, fonts, and images in the files.
faq.q3: Are my combined PDFs sent to servers?
faq.a3: Absolutely not. The merger works entirely client-side using JavaScript, keeping your documents confidential.
